tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Hand‑finished ceramic tile with a deep blue glaze, perfect for kitchen backsplashes or bathroom accents.

tiles.title: Marble Vein White
tiles.description: Luxurious white marble with subtle grey veining. Ideal for living room floors and feature walls.
tiles.creator: StoneCraft

tiles.title: Geometric Hexagon
tiles.description: Modern hexagonal tile with a geometric pattern in matte grey and white. Adds a contemporary edge to any room.
tiles.creator: Design Co

tiles.title: Terrazzo Splash
tiles.description: Terrazzo‑style porcelain tile with colourful chips. Perfect for bathrooms and statement floors.
tiles.creator: Retro Tileworks

tiles.title: Wood‑Look Plank
tiles.description: Warm oak‑effect ceramic plank, durable and easy to maintain. Brings natural warmth to living areas.
tiles.creator: EcoTile

tiles.title: Minimalist White Subway
tiles.description: Classic white subway tile with a high‑gloss finish. Timeless choice for kitchens and bathrooms.
tiles.creator: Bath & Beyond

tiles.title: Matt Black Slate
tiles.description: Dark slate‑effect porcelain with a natural cleft finish. Perfect for modern industrial interiors.
tiles.creator: StoneCraft

tiles.title: Hand‑Painted Spanish
tiles.description: Vibrant hand‑painted ceramic tile with floral motifs. Each piece is unique.
tiles.creator: Artisan Studio

tiles.title: Cement Encausic
tiles.description: Patterned cement tile with a vintage encaustic look. Great for hallways and statement floors.
tiles.creator: Encaustic Co

tiles.title: Glass Mosaic Teal
tiles.description: Iridescent teal glass mosaic tiles on mesh backing. Stunning for pools, bathrooms, or accent walls.
tiles.creator: AquaTile

tiles.title: Terracotta Rustic
tiles.description: Rustic terracotta tile with a warm earthy tone. Suitable for Mediterranean‑style patios and kitchens.
tiles.creator: Mediterra Tiles

tiles.title: 3D Wave White
tiles.description: White ceramic wall tile with a sculpted 3D wave pattern. Creates a stunning play of light and shadow.
tiles.creator: Design Co
